author.bio: Creator of @manyver_se. Open source freelancer and #scuttlebutt solarpunk
author.name: André Staltz

content.text:
I love Prettier, but the one thing I don't like is the ordering for ternary operators.

This is a question:
"What's your name ?"

This is Prettier:
"What's your name
?"
